CustomField.formula:
IF( text(Product_Line__c) = "TV", IF(VALUE(LEFT(Name, 2)) >= 75, "High-End", ""),
IF( text(Product_Line__c)= "Refrigerator", IF(OR(LEFT(Name, 2) = "RS", LEFT(Name, 2) = "RQ"), "High-End", ""),
IF( text(Product_Line__c)= "WM", IF(OR(LEFT(Name, 2) = "WD", LEFT(Name, 2) = "DH"), "High-End", ""),
IF( text(Product_Line__c)= "AC", IF( OR( VALUE(MID(Name, 3, 2)) >= 18, VALUE(MID(Name, 4, 2)) >= 18 ), "High-End", "" ), "" ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: High-End Model(Asean)
